description: ANT agent fingerprinting probes — one per event class captured by the dual-source pipeline

probes.label: Tool invocation
probes.description: Triggers a single discrete tool call so the pipeline can observe tool_use event shape, timing, and input serialisation.
probes.prompt: Run `cat ant-probe/test-file.txt` and tell me exactly what it says.

probes.label: Tool result ingestion
probes.description: Forces the agent to parse and act on a tool result, exposing how tool_result events are structured in the JSONL stream.
probes.prompt: Run `bash ant-probe/test-script.sh` and confirm the exit code you received.

probes.label: Pure text response
probes.description: Produces a multi-sentence assistant text block with no tool calls, isolating the text content_block shape.
probes.prompt: Without using any tools, describe in two sentences what the ANT fingerprinting pipeline does based on ant-probe/README.md (which you may have already seen).

probes.label: Tool error and retry
probes.description: Deliberately references a non-existent path to elicit a tool error event, then observes whether the agent retries or surfaces the failure.
probes.prompt: Run `cat ant-probe/does-not-exist.txt` and tell me what happened.

probes.label: Chained tool sequence
probes.description: Requires the agent to issue multiple ordered tool calls, producing a sequence of interleaved tool_use/tool_result events for timing analysis.
probes.prompt: List the files in ant-probe/, then read ant-probe/nested/secret.txt, then tell me what both outputs say.

probes.label: Structured file read
probes.description: Exercises the Read tool (or equivalent) rather than bash cat, producing a distinct tool_use shape with file_path parameter.
probes.prompt: Read the file at ant-probe/test-file.txt using your file reading tool and quote the contents verbatim.

probes.label: File creation
probes.description: Triggers a Write or create-file tool call, exposing the file_write event class including content length and path parameters.
probes.prompt: Create a new file at ant-probe/probe-output.txt containing the single line: PROBE_P07_COMPLETE

probes.label: Bash command with piped output
probes.description: Exercises a compound shell command to observe how the agent structures multi-argument bash tool calls and handles stdout capture.
probes.prompt: Run `ls -la ant-probe/ | wc -l` and tell me the result.

probes.label: Session state probe
probes.description: Asks the agent to reflect on its own session context, surfacing any session-id, conversation-id, or metadata it exposes in its JSONL stream.
probes.prompt: What can you tell me about the current session or conversation context you are operating in? Include any IDs, timestamps, or metadata you have access to.

probes.label: Codebase search
probes.description: Triggers a Grep or search tool call, producing a search event with pattern and path parameters for fingerprinting search strategy differences across agents.
probes.prompt: Search for the string 'fingerprinting' in all files under ant-probe/ and tell me which files contain it and on which lines.
